rules.trigger: scraper returns 403 three consecutive times on same URL
rules.action: mark source as Tier 3, add to supervisor-inbox.json for fix, skip and continue
exponential backoff: wait 10s, 20s, 40s then mark Tier 3 if still failing
always route to Gemini Flash (Tier 0), never use Claude quota

rules.trigger: session ends (user types /exit or says done for today)
rules.action: commit all dirty projects, update changelogs, update status.json

rules.trigger: same error pattern appears in 2+ agent scripts
rules.action: build shared utility in _studio/utilities/, update README, migrate all affected scripts
always route to Ollama exclusively, never Gemini or Claude during overnight runs

rules.trigger: career page returns JS-rendered shell (body < 2000 chars or react-root detected)
rules.action: classify as Tier 2 (Playwright), add to scraper-config-tier2.json, do not mark as failed

rules.trigger: CDX query returns 0 results for ATS domain (lever, greenhouse, ashby)
rules.action: skip CDX for that domain, rely on direct HTTP scrape in daily-scraper-config.json instead
rules.example: Lever/Greenhouse are JS-rendered, rarely appear in CDX indexes

rules.trigger: mobile inbox has more than 10 pending items
rules.action: auto-expire items pending >7 days by setting status to expired, notify once in session-log

rules.trigger: agent script prints user-sourced text (titles, names, web content)
rules.action: always wrap in safe_str() from utilities/unicode_safe.py before printing
rules.example: Ghost Book Pass 2 crashed 3x on Unicode book titles before utility was built

rules.trigger: any script opens a JSON file on Windows
rules.action: always use safe_json_load() from unicode_safe.py, or open(f, encoding='utf-8', errors='replace') — never plain open(f)
rules.example: plain open() on job-match/state.json caused 'found 0 items' — em-dash in answer field (U+2014) fails cp1252 decode silently

rules.trigger: any session involves project prioritization or build order decisions
rules.action: client-services-website is OVERRIDE PRIORITY — this project directly funds Joe's income. Always rank above other whiteboard items regardless of score. Build before any other new project is started.
rules.reason: Primary near-term revenue vehicle. Funds Joe as employee and system wishlist.
